2017
Our Story

Built to Redefine Nigerian Hospitality

Prezia Group of Companies was founded in 2017 with a singular purpose — to create meaningful experiences that bring relaxation, comfort, and entertainment to individuals and communities across Nigeria. From a bold vision, we have grown into a thriving multi-service enterprise trusted by hundreds of clients across Lagos.

Today, our four divisions operate in perfect synergy — each one delivering world-class results, all under the Prezia promise of excellence.

Get In Touch
🎯
Our Mission
To deliver premium services that exceed expectations at every touchpoint.
👁️
Our Vision
To be Nigeria's most trusted lifestyle and hospitality group.
💎
Our Values
Excellence, integrity, and community guide every decision we make.
🤝
Our Approach
An integrated model giving clients world-class solutions under one roof.
What We Offer

Four Divisions, One Standard of Excellence

01 — Hotels & Lounge

Rest. Recharge.
Reconnect.

Well-appointed accommodations, modern amenities, and personalized guest care for business and leisure travelers. Every detail — from service quality to ambiance — is curated to provide comfort and peace of mind throughout your stay.

Book a Stay →
02 — Real Estate

Invest. Develop.
Grow.

Comprehensive real estate solutions spanning residential, commercial, and hospitality developments. We partner with individuals, investors, and corporate clients to deliver properties that create lasting value.

Explore Properties →
03 — Entertainment

Experience.
Celebrate. Live.

Curated live events, performances, and experiential entertainment designed to captivate audiences. We blend creativity, professionalism, and flawless execution to deliver unforgettable moments at every gathering.

Plan Your Event →
04 — Photography

Capture.
Create. Inspire.

Professional photography covering corporate, lifestyle, events, and commercial shoots. We combine artistic vision with expert post-production to produce images that are authentic, engaging, and built to last.

View Our Work →

Creating Memories
That Last a Lifetime

From the moment you step into any Prezia experience, you'll understand why hundreds of clients across Lagos trust us with their most important moments — personal, professional, and everything in between.

Start Your Journey
The Prezia Difference

What Sets Us Apart

At Prezia Group, we don't just deliver services — we craft experiences. Our integrated model, premium standards, and community-first mindset make us unlike any other group in Nigeria.

🏆
Integrated Service Model

Unlike standalone businesses, Prezia Group brings hospitality, real estate, media, and entertainment under one trusted brand — giving clients a seamless, consistent experience across every touchpoint.

💎
Premium Standards Always

We apply luxury-grade standards across every division. Whether you're booking a hotel room or a live event, you receive the same unwavering dedication to quality that defines the Prezia name.

🌍
Community-First Approach

We are committed to contributing positively to the communities we serve — creating jobs, supporting local talent, and investing in the long-term growth of Lagos and beyond.

⚡
Flawless Execution

Our experienced team handles every detail with precision. From concept to completion, we ensure every project, event, and guest experience runs seamlessly from start to finish.

🤝
Long-Term Partnerships

We build lasting relationships — not just transactions. Our clients return to us again and again because we invest in understanding their needs and growing with them over time.

📍
Rooted in Lagos

As a Lagos-based enterprise, we understand this city deeply. Our local knowledge, connections, and presence give our clients an edge that no outside agency can match.

"
"Working with Prezia Group was a seamless experience from start to finish. Their attention to detail and commitment to excellence is unlike anything I've seen in Lagos. Truly a premium brand."
— Adaeze O., Corporate Client
